section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports dropping things more often due to decreased sensation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and functional complaint, not an objective exam finding; duplicating it in Findings could mislead a reader into interpreting it as an observed deficit rather than history.

section_miscategorizations.text: I may have to keep that in mind because I do want to do some backyard landscaping remodel work.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient statement about future activities and context, not a clinician plan or instruction; leaving it in the Plan section could confuse who is acting and what is being recommended.
